sourcesContent:
import "./legalNotice.css" const LegalNotice = () =>{ return(

Terms and Conditions for Nutrition Arvanitis

Welcome to Nutrition Arvanitis. These terms and conditions outline the detailed rules and regulations for the use of Nutrition Arvanitis' website and services. By accessing and using this website, we assume you accept these terms and conditions in full. Do not continue to use Nutrition Arvanitis' website if you do not agree to all of the terms and conditions stated on this page.

  1. Website and Service Usage

    Eligibility and Consent: You must be at least 18 years of age to use our services independently. Users under the age of 18 must have consent and supervision from a parent or guardian. By using our website and agreeing to these terms, you represent that you are at least 18 years old or have obtained parental or guardian consent. Service Description: Nutrition Arvanitis specializes in providing online nutrition consultation services. This includes, but is not limited to, personalized diet plans, nutrition advice, and workout program recommendations.

  2. Intellectual Property Rights

    Ownership and Use: All intellectual property rights for material on Nutrition Arvanitis are owned by or licensed to us. You may view, download for caching purposes only, and print pages or other content for your personal use, subject to the restrictions set out below and elsewhere in these terms and conditions. Restrictions: You must not republish, sell, rent, or sublicense material; reproduce or duplicate material; edit or otherwise modify material; or redistribute content (except content specifically made available for redistribution).

  3. User Content

    Nature and Use: User content includes any material (including without limitation text, images, audio material, video material, and audio-visual material) submitted to our website, for whatever purpose. You grant us a worldwide, irrevocable, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, adapt, publish, translate, and distribute your user content in existing or future media. Responsibility and Rights: You are responsible for your user content and must ensure it complies with legal and ethical standards. We reserve the right to edit or remove any material submitted to our website.

  4. Privacy and Personal Data

    Data Handling: Our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated by reference into these terms and conditions, details how we handle personal data collected from users. Please review the Privacy Policy for more information.

  5. Lmitations and Excluisions of Liability

    Scope of Liability: Our liability is limited and excluded to the maximum extent permitted under applicable law. We will not be liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential loss or damage arising under these terms and conditions or in connection with our website, whether arising in tort, contract, or otherwise. Accuracy of Information: While we strive to ensure that the information on this website is correct, we do not warrant its completeness or accuracy.

  6. User Conduct and Indemnification

    Acceptable Use: You must not use our website in any way that causes, or may cause, damage to the website or impairment of the availability or accessibility of the website. Indemnity: You hereby indemnify us and undertake to keep us indemnified against any losses, damages, costs, liabilities, and expenses incurred or suffered by us arising out of any breach by you of any provision of these terms and conditions.

  7. Severability

    If any provision of these terms and conditions is, or is found to be, unenforceable under applicable law, that will not affect the enforceability of the other provisions of these terms and conditions.

  8. Assignment and Transfer

    We may transfer, sub-contract, or otherwise deal with our rights and/or obligations under these terms and conditions without notifying you or obtaining your consent. You may not transfer, sub-contract, or otherwise deal with your rights and/or obligations under these terms and conditions.

  9. Entire Agreement

    These terms and conditions, together with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Nutrition Arvanitis in relation to your use of this website and supersede all previous agreements.

Contact Information

For any inquiries regarding these terms and conditions, please contact us at thymiosarvanitis@e-nutritionist.com or +34613497305.

) } export default LegalNotice
